title: Sealing arrangement and method for sealing at least one transition between at least two parts which are movable relative to one another
abstract: The invention relates to a sealing arrangement (2) for sealing at least one transition between at least two parts (4) and (6) which are movable relative to one another, having at least one first sealing device (10), which sealing device comprises at least one, in particular annular and multipart, sliding element (14) which is arranged on a first part (4) which can be rotated about an axis of rotation (8), which sealing device comprises at least one sliding element housing (16) which surrounds the sliding element (14) at least partially in the circumferential direction with respect to the axis of rotation (8), and which sealing device comprises at least one, in particular flexible, first pressing means (18) which is arranged between the sliding element (14) and the sliding element housing (16), and having at least one second sealing device (12), which sealing device comprises at least one, in particular annular, sealing means (20) which is arranged on the rotatable first part (4), and which sealing device comprises at least one sealing means housing (22) which at least partially encompasses the sealing means (20) in the circumferential direction. Said sealing arrangement is distinguished by the fact that the second sealing device (12) comprises a second pressing means (24) which is arranged between the sealing means (20) and the sealing means housing (22) and by which the sealing means (20) can be or is subjected to a force in the direction of the rotatable first part (4).
claims:
Claims PATENT CLAIMS 1. Sealing arrangement (2) for sealing at least one transition be tween at least two parts (4) and (6) which are movable relative to one an other, having at least one first sealing device (10), which sealing device comprises at least one, in particular annular and multipart, sliding ele ment (14) which is arranged on a first part (4) which can be rotated about an axis of rotation (8), which sealing device comprises at least one slid ing element housing (16) which surrounds the sliding element (14) at least partially in the circumferential direction with respect to the axis of rotation (8), and which sealing device comprises at least one, in particu lar flexible, first pressing means (18) which is arranged between the slid ing element (14) and the sliding element housing (16), and having at least one second sealing device (12), which sealing device comprises at least one, in particular annular, sealing means (20) which is arranged on the rotatable first part (4), and which sealing device comprises at least one sealing means housing (22) which at least partially encompasses the seal ing means (20) in the circumferential direction, characterized in that the second sealing device (12) comprises a second pressing means (24) which is arranged between the sealing means (20) and the sealing means housing (22) and by which the sealing means (20) can be or is subjected to a force in the direction of the rotatable first part (4). 2. Sealing arrangement (2) according to Claim 1, characterized in that the sealing means (20) bears against the rotatable first part (4) by an inner side facing the axis of rotation (8) and/or bears against the sliding element (14) by at least one radial end face. 3. Sealing arrangement (2) according to Claim 1 or 2, character ized in that the second pressing means (24) can be or is arranged directly on the sealing means (20), or in that the second pressing means (24) can be or is arranged indirectly on the sealing means (20), in particular in that a separating element (40) is arranged between the second pressing means (24) and the sealing means (20). 4. Sealing arrangement (2) according to one of the preceding claims, characterized in that the sealing arrangement (2) has a first set ting device (30) for the first pressing means (18) and/or a second setting device (32) for the second pressing means (24), by means of which there can be set an, in particular mechanically, pneumatically and/or hydrau lically induced, force which acts from the first pressing means (18) on the sliding element (14) and/or from the second pressing means (24) on the sealing means (20). 5. Sealing arrangement (2) according to one of the preceding claims, characterized in that the second pressing means (24) comprises a spring element (36), in particular a compression spring, and/or in that the second setting device (30) comprises a setting means (34), such as a pis ton-screw arrangement. 6. Sealing arrangement (2) according to Claim 5, characterized in that a web (42) has an externally threaded portion (48) and/or the sealing means housing (22) has an internally threaded bore (46), which corre sponds in particular to the externally threaded portion (48), and in that a rotation of the setting means (34) comprises a compression or relaxation of the second pressing means (24) designed as a spring element (36). 7. Sealing arrangement (2) according to either of the preceding Claims 5 and 6, characterized in that the sealing means housing (22) has, in particular in the continuation of the axis of the internally threaded bore (46), a guide (50) in which there is arranged at least one piston (38) which can be or is connected to the second pressing means (24) designed as a spring element (36); and/or characterized in that the internally threaded bore (46) is arranged on a web (42), which extends in particular parallel to the axis of rotation (8), and/or in that the guide (50) is ar ranged in a sealing means housing (22). 8. Sealing arrangement (2) according to one of the preceding claims, characterized in that the sealing means housing (22) and/or the sliding element housing (16) comprise/comprises a bore (28) for feeding lubricant and/or barrier agent to the sealing means (20) and/or to the slid ing element (14). 9. Sealing arrangement (2) according to one of the preceding claims, characterized in that at least one of the at least one first sealing device (10) and at least one of the at least one second sealing device (12) can be or are fastened to one another, in particular in a form-fitting and/or releasable manner, and/or in that at least one of the at least one first sealing device (10) and/or at least one of the at least one second sealing device (12) have/has a radially extending surface which can be or is sealingly fastened to a second part (6) with respect to which the first part (4) can be or is moved relatively. 10. Sealing arrangement (2) according to one of the preceding claims, characterized in that the sealing arrangement (2) has a first seal ing device (10) which is arranged between two second sealing devices (12). 11. Sealing device (12) for a sealing arrangement (2) according to one of Claims 1 to 10, having at least one, in particular annular, sealing means (20) which is arranged on the rotatable first part (4), and having at least one sealing means housing (22) which at least partially encompasses the sealing means (20) in the circumferential direction, characterized in that the sealing device (12) comprises a second pressing means (24) which is arranged between the sealing means (20) and the sealing means housing (22) and by which the sealing means (20) can be or is subjected to a force in the direction of the rotatable first part (4). 12. The use of a sealing arrangement (2) according to one of Claims 1 to 10 for sealing the transitions from moving parts to stationary parts, in particular for sealing the product discharge side of a rotary tube kiln, preferably for sealing the product discharge side of a rotary tube kiln for the production of hydrogen fluoride. 13. Method for sealing at least one transition between at least two parts (4) and (6) which are movable relative to one another, in particular for sealing rotating drums, tubes or shafts with respect to stationary housings, comprising the following steps: a) arranging a second sealing device (12), which sealing device com prises at least one, in particular annular, sealing means (20) which 

 is arranged on a first part (4) which can be rotated about an axis of rotation (8), and which sealing device comprises at least one sealing means housing (22) which at least partially encompasses the sealing means (20) in the circumferential direction, on the rotatable first part (4); b) where appropriate, fastening the second sealing device (12), in par ticular the sealing means housing, in a second, in particular posi tionally fixed, part (6); c) arranging a first sealing device (10), which sealing device com- prises an, in particular annular and multipart, sliding element (14) which is arranged around the rotatable first part (4), which sealing device comprises a sliding element housing (16) which partially surrounds the sliding element (14) at least in the circumferential di rection, and which sealing device comprises an, in particular flexi- ble, first pressing means (18) which is arranged between the sliding element (14) and sliding element housing (16), on the rotatable first part (4); d) where appropriate, fastening, in particular fastening in a form-fit- ting and releasable manner, the first sealing device (10) to the sec- ond sealing device (12); e) setting a pressing force of the first pressing means (18); characterized in that the method further comprises the following step: f) setting a pressing force of a second pressing means (24) of the sec- ond sealing device (12). 14. Method according to Claim 13, characterized in that a pressing force by which the sliding element (14) bears against the first part (4) is set by a first setting device (30), and/or in that the pressing force by which the sealing means (20) bears against the first part (4) is set by a second setting device (32); and/or 

 characterized in that the pressing force of the sealing means (20) is in creased or reduced mechanically, and/or in that the pressing force of the sliding element (14) is increased or reduced pneumatically or hydrau lically. 15. Method according to Claim 13 or 14, characterized in that the at least two parts (4) and (6) which are movable relative to one another are components of a product discharge side of a rotary tube kiln for the pro duction of hydrogen fluoride.
